evidence: LLDB launch was blocked because debugserver is unavailable on this host, explicit-arch LLDB failed the same way, GDB is not installed, and direct execution of bugs/protobuf/protobuf-001/debugging/poc_debug aborts before main() in google::protobuf::DescriptorPool::Tables::Tables during descriptor registration. The runtime never reaches JsonStringToMessage() or json_internal::ParseAny(), so no finding-specific incorrect ParseAny state was observed for protobuf-001 in this build artifact.
